KeyPersonnelExecutiveInformation.NameFlag: Name Fielded into First, Middle and Last
KeyPersonnelExecutiveInformation.Name: CHRISTOPHER KATTOS

CorporateLinkage.LinkageCompanyName: HOME DEPOT MEXICO, S. DE R.L. DE C.V

BusinessFacts.FileEstablishedFlag: Business was added prior to Jan 1977
BusinessFacts.PublicIndicator: This is a known publicly traded company

EnhancedBusinessDescription.BusinessDescription: Founded in 1978 and headquartered in Atlanta, GA, The Home Depot, Inc. (NYSE: HD) is a home improvement retailer company. The company sells an assortment of building materials, home improvement, and lawn & garden products and provides associated services. It caters to do-it-yourself customers, do-it-for-me customers, and professional customers. The company operates 1,974 stores across various states in the US, as well as has international operations in Canada, China, and Mexico. According to the company's current 10K government filing it had FYE 01/29/2012 sales of $70.3 billion and has 331,000 employees.

IntelliscoreScoreInformation.PubliclyHeldCompany: Profile may contain data which for other businesses would be considered derogatory. Use caution in applying score.
Profile may contain data which for other businesses would be considered derogatory. Use caution in applying score.

ScoreFactors.ScoreFactor: NUMBER OF COMMERCIAL DEROGATORY PUBLIC RECORDS
RISK ASSOCIATED WITH THE COMPANY'S INDUSTRY SECTOR
NUMBER OF RECENTLY PLACED COMMERCIAL COLLECTION ACCOUNTS
